title: Star Wars The Mandalorian Kids Inflatable Punching Bop Bag Exercise Toy
description:
Your little hero can fight villains and save the day with the Star Wars Mandalorian Punching Bop Bag! This inflatable bop bag inflates to 34.5". Your child will love pretending they are training with their favorite characters from the hit show The Mandalorian with this durable punching bag. This bop bag is a great way to encourage your little one to exercise and use their imagination to pretend play they are defeating the most notorious villains from the Star Wars franchise! The bop bag inflates to 34.5 inches and is weighted on the bottom by water so it will always spring back up after impact ensuring hours of fun. It also comes with a repair kit in case of a rip or tear

Your little hero can fight villains and save the day with the Star Wars Mandalorian Punching Bop Bag! This inflatable bop bag inflates to 34.5".

Key Features

Your child will love pretending they are training with their favorite characters from the hit show The Mandalorian with this durable punching bag.
